related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Artemis
related.teaser: Artemis is a tide that remembers — Crescent; under Moon; in Cancer; with II High Priestess.

related.name: II. The High Priestess
related.teaser: The High Priestess veils and unveils — water of intuition reflecting the unspoken truths.

related.name: Grape Agate

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ᛈ Perthro
